import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import Button from '../components/UI/Button'; import { SparklesIcon, ChartBarIcon, DocumentTextIcon, AcademicCapIcon, ShieldCheckIcon, RocketLaunchIcon, CheckCircleIcon, ArrowRightIcon, MagnifyingGlassIcon, LightBulbIcon, ClockIcon, UsersIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline'; const Home = () => { const { user } = useAuth(); const features = [ { icon: DocumentTextIcon, title: "Resume Upload", description: "Upload your resume in PDF or DOCX format. Our AI extracts all relevant information for analysis.", color: "from-blue-500 to-cyan-500", bgColor: "bg-blue-50" }, { icon: MagnifyingGlassIcon, title: "Job Description Analysis", description: "Paste any job description and our AI compares it against your resume to find the perfect match.", color: "from-purple-500 to-pink-500", bgColor: "bg-purple-50" }, { icon: ChartBarIcon, title: "ATS Score", description: "Get your ATS compatibility score with detailed breakdown of how to improve your resume.", color: "from-green-500 to-emerald-500", bgColor: "bg-green-50" }, { icon: AcademicCapIcon, title: "Skill Matching", description: "See which skills match the job requirements and identify skills you need to add.", color: "from-orange-500 to-red-500", bgColor: "bg-orange-50" }, { icon: LightBulbIcon, title: "Smart Suggestions", description: "Receive personalized recommendations to optimize your resume for each job application.", color: "from-yellow-500 to-amber-500", bgColor: "bg-yellow-50" }, { icon: ClockIcon, title: "Analysis History", description: "Track all your past analyses and see your progress over time.", color: "from-indigo-500 to-purple-500", bgColor: "bg-indigo-50" } ]; const stats = [ { value: "95%", label: "Accuracy Rate", icon: CheckCircleIcon }, { value: "10k+", label: "Resumes Analyzed", icon: DocumentTextIcon }, { value: "500+", label: "Skills Database", icon: AcademicCapIcon }, { value: "24/7", label: "AI Support", icon: SparklesIcon } ]; const howItWorks = [ { step: 1, title: "Create Account", description: "Sign up for free to start analyzing your resumes.", icon: UsersIcon }, { step: 2, title: "Upload Resume", description: "Upload your resume in PDF or DOCX format.", icon: DocumentTextIcon }, { step: 3, title: "Paste Job Description", description: "Copy and paste the job description you're targeting.", icon: MagnifyingGlassIcon }, { step: 4, title: "Get Analysis", description: "Receive instant AI-powered insights and suggestions.", icon: SparklesIcon } ]; if (user) { // If user is logged in, redirect to dashboard window.location.href = '/'; return null; } return (
